title: Bhishma's Final Stand: The Blood Moon of War

scenes.narration: The clash of titans begins as armies of Kurukshetra collide under a blood-soaked sky.
scenes.image_prompt: Towering warriors in ancient armor clash in a storm of swords and chariots, cinematic rain-soaked lighting, dynamic low-angle composition

scenes.narration: Bhishma stands resolute on his chariot, his third eye blazing as warriors fall around him.
scenes.image_prompt: Bhishma in regal attire dominating the battlefield, golden sunlight breaking through smoke, shallow depth of field

scenes.narration: An arrow approaches... but Bhishma’s vision is filled with destiny, not fear.
scenes.image_prompt: Arrow flying towards Bhishma’s chariot, battle haze, dramatic motion blur, cinematic chiaroscuro lighting

scenes.narration: The arrow pierces his armor, but Bhishma smiles—the end is near.
scenes.image_prompt: Bhishma’s chariot mid-impact, blood droplets suspended in air, hyper-detailed particle effects

scenes.narration: His body lies still as the world around him burns—a king’s final breath.
scenes.image_prompt: Bhishma’s lifeless face bathed in firelight, smoldering chariot wheels, wide shot of distant battles

scenes.narration: The tale of the immortal warrior concludes as the sun sinks below the horizon.
scenes.image_prompt: A stark silhouette of Bhishma suspended on the arrow bed against a blood-red setting sun, the fires of war raging in the distance, final epic comic panel, fade to black, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: A legend etched in blood and honor—Bhishma’s legacy lives on.
scenes.image_prompt: Symbolic ash and embers swirling in the dark, minimalist starry sky, slow zoom out effect
